de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.macros

Class UseInformationFlowContractMacro.PropExpansionStrategy

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.macros.UseInformationFlowContractMacro.PropExpansionStrategy
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named, Feature, Strategy
    Enclosing class:
    UseInformationFlowContractMacro

    protected class UseInformationFlowContractMacro.PropExpansionStrategy
extends Object
implements Strategy
    This strategy accepts all rule apps for which the rule name starts with a string in the admitted set and rejects everything else.

    • Method Detail

      • name

        public Name name()
        Description copied from interface: Named
        returns the name of this element
        Specified by:
        name in interface Named
        Returns:
        the name of the element

      • computeCost

        public RuleAppCost computeCost(RuleApp ruleApp,
                               PosInOccurrence pio,
                               Goal goal)
        Description copied from interface: Feature
        Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
        Specified by:
        computeCost in interface Feature
        Parameters:
        ruleApp - the RuleApp
        pio - position where app is to be applied
        goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
        Returns:
        the cost of the rule application expressed as a RuleAppCost object. TopRuleAppCost.INSTANCE indicates that the rule shall not be applied at all (it is discarded by the strategy).

      • isApprovedApp

        public boolean isApprovedApp(RuleApp app,
                             PosInOccurrence pio,
                             Goal goal)
        Description copied from interface: Strategy
        Re-Evaluate a RuleApp. This method is called immediately before a rule is really applied
        Specified by:
        isApprovedApp in interface Strategy
        Returns:
        true iff the rule should be applied, false otherwise

      • instantiateApp

        public void instantiateApp(RuleApp app,
                           PosInOccurrence pio,
                           Goal goal,
                           RuleAppCostCollector collector)
        Description copied from interface: Strategy
        Instantiate an incomplete RuleApp. This method is called when the AutomatedRuleApplicationManager comes across a rule application in which some schema variables are not yet instantiated, or which is in some other way incomplete. The strategy then has the opportunity to return/provide a list of (more) complete rule applications by feeding them into the provided RuleAppCostCollector.
        Specified by:
        instantiateApp in interface Strategy

      • isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal

        public boolean isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal()
        Description copied from interface: Strategy
        Checks if the Strategy should stop at the first non closeable Goal.
        Specified by:
        isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal in interface Strategy
        Returns:
        true stop, false continue on other Goals.
